text:
<think>I need to first calculate the time for a 1177 km trip at a speed of 80 km/h. I can use the trip_plan tool to compute the travel time.</think>
<tool_call_answer>[{"name": "trip_plan", "arguments": {"distance_km": 1177, "speed_kmh": 80, "consumption_per_100km": 0}, "label": "$var1"}]</tool_call_answer>
